claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This note is not a proof that B3 is impossible, not a molecular reaction dynamics solution, not a quantum advantage claim, and not a BQP separation.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: The current B3 same-access measurement route should stay demoted until M5-M9 are replaced by full covariance, state-prep, denominator-win, optimizer, and B10 access evidence.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: source rescue gate is the expected failed B3/B10 gate
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Re-run the source gate with a new version if the upstream evidence changes.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: same-access rescue is explicitly not ready
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Set readiness true only after all same-access measurement gates pass.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: failed gate set identifies the exact blockers
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Replace M5-M9 with passing evidence or update the negative note with a new blocker set.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: full compiled-state covariance is missing
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Compute full compiled-state covariance, or a stronger bounded substitute, for every molecule row.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: state preparation remains one-parameter and unconverged
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Provide multi-parameter UCCSD/ADAPT/VQE or alternative chemistry state-preparation convergence evidence.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: selected-CI/FCI denominator wins are zero
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Produce at least one same-access denominator win after derivative and optimizer-loop costs.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: optimizer-loop shot floor is still prohibitive
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Reduce optimizer-loop shot demand below the positive-route stress ceiling under the same target error.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: B10 access bridge still rejects the current evidence
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Update the B10 same-access contract only after B3 has full covariance, state-prep, denominator, and optimizer evidence.

negative_boundary_conditions.label: forbidden claims are all false
negative_boundary_conditions.reopen_requirement: Keep forbidden claims false until an independently reproduced same-access positive route exists.
